message:
fix(rotation): data race guards, nil-safe handoff, checked error handling

Add mu.Lock/RLock guards around r.history append/reads (GetHistory,
ClearHistory) and r.pending reads (GetPendingRotations, GetPendingRotation,
HasPendingRotation) — these were unprotected data races.

GetHistory() now returns a copy of the slice, not the live backing array.

Replace all _ = AddPendingRotation/RemovePendingRotation/RecordRotation
with checked error handling logging warnings via slog.Warn.

Fix nil-safe handoff: when ParseAgentResponse returns nil even on
non-empty text, fall through to GenerateFallbackSummary. Guard
.FormatForNewAgent() and .TokenEstimate against nil handoffSummary.

rotateAgent accepts optional RotationMethod parameter so ManualRotate
sets method upfront instead of overwriting after (race-prone).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
